test_name: British English Academy Adaptive CEFR Placement Test
purpose: Paid diagnostic placement and internal platform certificate/report; not an official Cambridge, Pearson, McGraw Hill or Council of Europe qualification.
target_users: Learners aged 14+ and adult candidates; younger-learner version can be configured separately.
route: Landing page -> paid Stripe checkout -> adaptive test -> score report -> certificate verification page

domains.scoring: rubric extension / human or AI marking recommended for institutional use

quality_controls: no repeated items in a session
